semantic.role: Pipeline task stage that orchestrates selective derivation of architectural views (public surface, risk hotspots, architecture diagram) using the ViewService facade, based on enabled views configuration.
responsibilities: Instantiates ViewService with runtime dependencies (rootDir, outputManager, runtimeIO, llmClient).
Computes disabled view IDs from VIEW_DEFINITIONS by filtering out enabled views.
Clears view artifacts for all disabled views to maintain consistency.
Derives the public surface view when enabled, capturing exported symbols and their visibility.
Derives the risk hotspots view when enabled, identifying high-risk areas in the codebase.
Derives the architecture diagram view when enabled, generating an architectural overview.
Collects skipped views into an array for reporting when their derivation is not enabled.
outOfScope: Direct CLI command parsing or user input handling.
Implementation of individual view derivation logic (delegated to ViewService and view modules).
Persistent storage or output formatting beyond clearing artifacts.
invariants: Task must operate via core task contracts (SpineTask, TaskContext) without bypassing runtime context.
View selection must be driven solely by the enabledViews configuration; no hardcoded view assumptions.
All disabled views must have their artifacts cleared before any derivation begins.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Integrate view derivation as a dedicated pipeline stage to produce architectural governance artifacts (public surface, risk hotspots, diagram) in a configurable manner.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactored view derivation from a monolithic flow into a task stage with selective view generation based on enabled views configuration.

publicSurface: export class ViewDerivationTask extends SpineTask<CommitStageOutput, ViewDerivationStageOutput>
async execute(ctx: TaskContext, input: CommitStageOutput): Promise<ViewDerivationStageOutput>
semantic.driftReason: Previous semantic included a skip condition during incremental sync when no changes are committed and no directories are affected. The current code snippet does not exhibit this logic; instead, it selectively derives views based solely on enabledViews configuration, omitting the incremental sync skip.

English.role: Pipeline task stage that orchestrates selective derivation of architectural views (public surface, risk hotspots, architecture diagram) using the ViewService facade, based on enabled views configuration.
responsibilities: Instantiates ViewService with runtime dependencies (rootDir, outputManager, runtimeIO, llmClient).
Computes disabled view IDs from VIEW_DEFINITIONS by filtering out enabled views.
Clears view artifacts for all disabled views to maintain consistency.
Derives the public surface view when enabled, capturing exported symbols and their visibility.
Derives the risk hotspots view when enabled, identifying high-risk areas in the codebase.
Derives the architecture diagram view when enabled, generating an architectural overview.
Collects skipped views into an array for reporting when their derivation is not enabled.
outOfScope: Direct CLI command parsing or user input handling.

Persistent storage or output formatting beyond clearing artifacts.

Simplified Chinese.role: 流水线任务阶段，通过 ViewService 门面基于启用的视图配置，有选择地编排架构视图（公共表面、风险热点、架构图）的推导。
responsibilities: 使用运行时依赖（rootDir、outputManager、runtimeIO、llmClient）实例化 ViewService。
根据VIEW_DEFINITIONS计算禁用的视图ID，剔除已启用的视图。
清除所有禁用视图的产物以保持一致性。
当启用时，推导公共表面视图，捕获导出符号及其可见性。
当启用时，推导风险热点视图，识别代码库中的高风险区域。
当启用时，推导架构图视图，生成架构概览。
当视图推导未启用时，将跳过的视图收集到数组以进行报告。
outOfScope: 直接处理CLI命令解析或用户输入。
实现单个视图的推导逻辑（委托给ViewService和视图模块）。
超出清除产物的持久化存储或输出格式编排。
